attributes.action: End the pothole plague and the bad state of our roads
attributes.additional_details:
The important reason for this petition, is the condition of our roads are in a disgusting state. 
In turn this is causing excess damage to our cars daily. In some cases with the amount of rainfall the potholes are full of water which disguises just how deep they are.
When trying to avoid this plague of potholes, accidents are being caused due to crossing the white line which is obviously dangerous.
attributes.background: Return our roads to a drivable state.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Provide funding to repair severe potholes and compensate drivers
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/760312
